context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee ID (custom_employee_id) and Biometric ID fields are fully implemented and working. Bulk import endpoint was added during this iteration (/api/employees/bulk-import). The endpoint accepts CSV and XLSX files, validates required fields, checks for duplicate Employee IDs/Biometric IDs, and returns detailed error messages. All features verified working via backend tests and UI Playwright tests.
